code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let trimmed = string.trim(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  let n = parts.len()
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut current_max = 0
  while i < n
    let part = parts.get(i)
    match part
    when Some(p)
      let parsed = string.parse_int(p)
      match parsed
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          current_max = v
        else if v > current_max
          current_max = v
        end
        if i == 0
          result = "#{current_max}"
        else
          result = "#{result} #{current_max}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
